key_themes: Strong FY2025 results with revenue growth to ~£1.04B and higher earnings
Analyst upgrades to Buy with significant price target upside (avg ~165 GBX)
Operational execution and strategic growth in lime/aggregates/sustainable materials
Recent share price momentum and positive technical signals
Record EPS highlights amid sector challenges
summary: SigmaRoc (AIM: SRC.L), a UK-based lime, limestone and aggregates producer, shows solidly positive sentiment in April 2026 after reporting revenue growth of ~8% to over £1 billion for 2025 along with improved profitability and record EPS in interim results.[[1]](https://stockanalysis.com/quote/aim/SRC/)[[2]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/SRC.L/) Analysts have raised targets (up to 216 GBX) and upgraded the stock to a Buy candidate as of mid-April, driving recent gains of over 5% with the shares trading near 130-135 GBX.[[3]](https://stockinvest.us/stock/SRC.L)[[4]](https://www.marketbeat.com/stocks/LON/SRC/forecast/) Investor focus centers on execution, acquisitions, and sector positioning, though social media discussion remains light compared to professional research and earnings coverage. Overall outlook is optimistic but tied to construction cycle trends.
sources: 10+ web/news results (Yahoo Finance, MarketBeat, StockInvest.us, GuruFocus transcripts), Multiple analyst reports (Berenberg, Panmure Gordon, Deutsche Bank, others), X keyword/semantic searches (~5 relevant mentions; limited direct $SRC.L buzz amid noise from SRC.V, crypto $SRC, and unrelated tickers)
